/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/sentinex-gui.dir/sentinex-gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinex-gui.dir/src/ui/main.cpp.o" -o sentinex  libsentinex-ui.a libsentinex-system-monitor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
